trends.headline: G3-Class Geomagnetic Storm Sparks Aurora Sightings at 45°N
trends.summary: NOAA Space Weather Center confirms a G3 storm making aurora visible across mid-latitudes for the next 48 hours.

trends.headline: Open-Source Lattice Infill Algorithm Cuts Print Time by 34%
trends.summary: A new STL post-processor released on GitHub generates optimised gyroid lattices, significantly reducing material use and print duration.

trends.headline: Critical Zero-Day in OpenSSH Daemon — Patch Available
trends.summary: CVE-2026-3141 allows unauthenticated remote code execution on OpenSSH < 9.8. Patches released; update immediately.

trends.headline: New Solid-State Cell Achieves 480 Wh/kg at Room Temperature
trends.summary: Researchers publish peer-reviewed results showing a solid-state lithium cell surpassing 480 Wh/kg with 1,200 cycle durability.

trends.headline: Universal Announces Immersive Dark Ride IP for 2028 Opening
trends.summary: A new franchise-based dark ride is confirmed for Universal Epic Universe, using next-gen pneumatic motion bases.

trends.headline: Flash Flood Warning Issued for PCT Section K — Detour Route Published
trends.summary: Heavy snowmelt triggers USFS flash flood warning on the Pacific Crest Trail in Section K. Official detour added to Guthook.

trends.headline: TrueNAS SCALE 25.04 Released — ZFS 3.0 Native Encryption Default
trends.summary: iXsystems ships TrueNAS SCALE 25.04 with ZFS 3.0, enabling native at-rest encryption for all new pools by default.

trends.headline: Phase 2 Trial: Senolytics Reduce Biological Age Markers by 18%
trends.summary: A 90-day double-blind Phase 2 trial of a dasatinib/quercetin protocol shows statistically significant reductions in p16INK4a expression.

trends.headline: California SB-244 Expands Right-to-Repair to All Vehicles Under 15 Years Old
trends.summary: Governor signs SB-244 requiring OEMs to provide diagnostic data and repair manuals to independent shops for all vehicles up to 15 model years.

trends.headline: OpenAgents v2 Framework Enables Multi-Agent Browser Automation Without API Keys
trends.summary: New open-source release lets locally hosted LLMs orchestrate browser agents using only screenshot-based observation loops.

trends.headline: Chainsaw Man Part 3 Officially Confirmed — Weekly Serialization Begins May
trends.summary: Shueisha announces Chainsaw Man Part 3 via Jump+, with weekly chapters beginning the first week of May 2026.

trends.headline: Federal Courts Mandate PACER Successor — PACER 2.0 API Now Open
trends.summary: The Administrative Office of US Courts opens the PACER 2.0 REST API for e-filing integrations, replacing legacy SOAP endpoints.
